notes: OfficerCommandProfile now includes commandCapacity, commandLoad, and commandOverload.
Rank defines baseline command capacity. Branch-fitting traits can raise capacity.
Over-capacity brigades apply morale, condition, control-radius, reserve-readiness, and fallback-threshold penalties at battle creation.
